sanskrit: श्रोत्रं चक्षुः स्पर्शनं च रसनं घ्राणमेव च। अधिष्ठाय मनश्चायं विषयानुपसेवते॥
transliteration: śrotraṃ cakṣuḥ sparśanaṃ ca rasanaṃ ghrāṇam eva ca | adhiṣṭhāya manaś cāyaṃ viṣayān upasevate ||
literal_meaning: The embodied self, presiding over ear, eye, touch, taste, and smell, together with the mind, experiences sense-objects.
contextual_meaning: Consciousness localizes in a new body-instrument set; the quality of that instrument (and the desires that magnetized it) determines which sensory world the mind will now chase, reinforcing the same imprinted patterns.
psychological_state: Post-death identity diffusion followed by re-constellation around the strongest residual affective schema; equivalent to waking from a dream into a new narrative already colored by yesterday’s unfinished affect.
trigger_scenario: Scrolling social media after midnight: each click is a micro-rebirth into a fresh body of content chosen by the algorithm that already ‘knows’ your past cravings; the feed becomes the next womb.
anchor_text: Your body is the remote; the channels you pick become the life you live.
